sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49596" key="quwri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῠωρ-ίς</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τράπεζα</foreign>), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n49596.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a table for offerings</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:123" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.123</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θυωρός</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
